articles.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Is In Talks To Buy Modular For $4 Billion
articles.description: Qualcomm is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire AI infrastructure software company Modular Inc. in a transaction valued at about $4b. The potential deal would expand Qualcomm's capabilities in artificial intelligence software and infrastructure. The transaction, if completed, would mark a major move by Qualcomm to deepen its role in AI beyond its existing hardware footprint. QUALCOMM (NasdaqGS:QCOM) is drawing fresh attention as it considers a roughly $4b acquisition of Modular Inc., a...
